tasks.name: Discovery & Alignment
tasks.description: Shape the delivery scope while downstream planning starts in parallel.

children.name: Stakeholder interviews
children.description: Confirm operational constraints, target users, and decision owners.

children.name: Business case
children.description: Model expected value, success criteria, and release economics.

children.name: Scope sign-off
children.description: Decision point that authorizes build and launch preparation.

tasks.name: Platform Build
tasks.description: Backend and data work begin before discovery is fully closed.

children.name: Integration design
children.description: Define service boundaries, integration contracts, and rollout sequencing.

children.name: Core services
children.description: Build APIs, orchestration, and persistence for the initial release.

children.name: Reporting pipeline
children.description: Stand up downstream reporting and quality controls while core services continue.

tasks.name: Experience & Readiness
tasks.description: Frontend, training, and go-live tasks intentionally overlap the final build window.

children.name: Operator workflows
children.description: Deliver the primary operator journeys and role-based UX refinements.

children.name: Training content
children.description: Prepare facilitator guides, demos, and adoption material before launch.

children.name: Release rehearsal
children.description: Full rehearsal of support handoffs, runbooks, and go-live criteria.

children.name: Launch window
children.description: Production deployment and early-hypercare command window.
